entities.name: DETAILED_RECAP (B01)
entities.context: Required block with 3 sections: Key Decisions and Agreements, Strategic Context, Critical Next Action

entities.name: COMMITMENTS_CONTEXTUAL (B02)
entities.context: Required block elevated in v1.5; table format tracking Owner, Deliverable, Context/Why, Due Date, Dependencies

entities.name: Contextual Intelligence
entities.context: Principle of applying guidance thoughtfully rather than robotically

entities.name: Strategic Context
entities.context: Narrative section covering positioning, pain points, competitive landscape

entities.name: Critical Next Action
entities.context: Action item structure requiring Owner, Deliverable, Timeline, Purpose

relationships.context: System designed to help Vrijen act on meeting information

B02 elevated to required status in v1.5 update
Strategic Context is one of three required sections within B01

Core principle guiding how to apply the framework
